mapper.select: SELECT avg_backend_flush_ratio as value, total_buffers_clean as buffersClean, total_buffers_backend as buffersBackend FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, avg_clean_rate as clean_rate FROM
bgwriter_agg_1m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_1m
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, total_buffers_backend as backend, total_buffers_clean as clean FROM
bgwriter_agg_1m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_1m
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, total_maxwritten_clean as maxwritten_clean FROM
bgwriter_agg_1m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_1m
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(b.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, b.total_buffers_clean as bgwriter, c.total_buffers_checkpoint as checkpoint FROM
bgwriter_agg_1m b LEFT JOIN checkpoint_agg_1m c ON b.instance_id = c.instance_id AND DATE_TRUNC('minute', b.collected_at) = DATE_TRUNC('minute', c.collected_at)
bgwriter_agg_5m b LEFT JOIN checkpoint_agg_5m c ON b.instance_id = c.instance_id AND DATE_TRUNC('minute', b.collected_at) = DATE_TRUNC('minute', c.collected_at)
bgwriter_agg_1m b LEFT JOIN checkpoint_agg_1m c ON b.instance_id = c.instance_id AND DATE_TRUNC('minute', b.collected_at) = DATE_TRUNC('minute', c.collected_at)
WHERE b.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND b.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND b.collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY b.collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, 100.0 * total_buffers_clean / NULLIF(total_buffers_clean + total_buffers_backend, 0) as reuse_rate FROM
bgwriter_agg_1m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_5m
bgwriter_agg_1m
WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT avg_backend_flush_ratio as bgwriterActivityRate, 100.0 * total_buffers_clean / NULLIF(total_buffers_clean + total_buffers_backend, 0) as cleanBufferReuseRate, total_backend_fsync as backendFsyncCount FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id

SELECT bgwriter_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, maxwritten_clean, created_at, buffers_alloc, avg_cycle_time_ms FROM bgwriter_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bgwriter_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, maxwritten_clean, buffers_alloc, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{buffersClean}, #{buffersBackend}, #{buffersBackendFsync}, #{maxwrittenClean}, #{buffersAlloc}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO bgwriter_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgBackendFlushRatio}, #{avgCleanRate}, #{totalBuffersClean}, #{totalBuffersBackend}, #{totalBackendFsync}, #{totalMaxwrittenClean}, #{status}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO bgwriter_agg_5m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgBackendFlushRatio}, #{avgCleanRate}, #{totalBuffersClean}, #{totalBuffersBackend}, #{totalBackendFsync}, #{totalMaxwrittenClean}, #{status}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT bgwriter_agg_id, instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, created_at, avg_cycle_time_ms FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at < #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at
